I want to set up preferred payment methods in the app,
so that my transactions are quick and easy when being redirected to the chosen ride-hailing service.
column3:
Scenario: Setting up preferred payment methods
  Given a user has logged into the ride-hailing app
  And the user navigates to the payment settings
  When the user selects a preferred payment method
  Then the preferred payment method should be saved
  And the user should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 19: View Discount Offers
● User Story: As a person who wants a cheap transportation service,
I want to view discount offers on transportation services,
So that I can take advantage of promotions and save money on travel.
column3:
Scenario: View available discount offers on transportation services
  Given a user is on the transportation service homepage
  When the user navigates to the discount offers section
  Then the user should see a list of available discount offers
  And the offers should include details on the promotion and savings

column1: User Story 20: Filter Options by Transportation Mode
column2:

I want to filter the options by transportation type, such as motorcycle or car,
so that I can only see the options that suit my preferences.
column3:
Scenario: Filter transportation options by type
  Given a user wants a cheap transportation service
  And the user is on the transportation options page
  When the user filters the options by motorcycle

  When the person enters the origin and destination address of the trip
  Then the system searches for transportation options for the desired route

I want to select the transportation services I want to search for the ride from,
So that I can compare the options from different transportation platforms.

Scenario: Selecting transportation services to compare options

  When the person selects the transportation services to search for a ride
  Then the person can compare the options from different transportation platforms

I want to choose the type of transportation (motorbike or car), so that I can filter the

column3:
Scenario: Choose transportation type for cheap service
  Given a person who wants a cheap transportation service
  When the person chooses the type of transportation as motorbike
  Then the options should be filtered according to motorbike transportation need

column2:

column3:

I want to get the trip list of each transportation service, so that I can

column2:

I want to choose the trip that suits me best, so that I can be redirected to the

column3:
Scenario: Choosing the best ride for cheap transportation
  Given a person wants a cheap transportation service

  Given a user wants a cheap ride service

  And the user should be able to sort ride results according to their preferred criteria

column2:

column2:

column2:
